# mongo_document

> Type-safe MongoDB model code generation for Dart, backed by a local MongoDB driver package (`mongo_document_db_driver`).

## Canonical Docs

- [Human README](README.md): high-level usage.
- [AI Guide](README.AI.md): machine-oriented integration and operational rules.

## Package AI Docs

- [mongo_document_annotation AI Guide](packages/mongo_document_annotation/README.AI.md): annotations, runtime helpers, connection lifecycle, generated API expectations.
- [mongo_document AI Guide](packages/mongo_document_generator/README.AI.md): source_gen builder behavior and generation commands.
- [mongo_document_db_driver AI Guide](packages/mongo_document_db_driver/README.AI.md): low-level driver usage and connection patterns.

## Required Commands

- Install dependencies: `dart pub get`
- Generate code: `dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs`
- Watch generation: `dart run build_runner watch --delete-conflicting-outputs`

## Runtime Contract

- Initialize once: `MongoDbConnection.initialize(...)`
- Reuse connection via: `MongoDbConnection.instance`
- Clean shutdown: `MongoDbConnection.shutdownDb()`

## Security Contract

- Do not commit connection strings with credentials.
- Use environment variables for database URIs and secrets.
